headline: These overlooked chip stocks are getting an AI boost
summary: The AI boom isn't just fueling the memory trade. The not-so-flashy analogy chip space is also seeing a boost.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Analog Devices, Raises Price Target to $460
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Joshua Buchalter   maintains Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $450 to $460.

raw.headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Analog Devices, Raises Price Target to $460
raw.summary: TD Cowen  analyst Joshua Buchalter   maintains Analog Devices (NASDAQ:ADI) with a Buy and raises the price target from $450 to $460.

headline: Shares of semiconductor and chip companies are trading lower due to volatility initiated from South Korea after Samsung and SK Hynix fell, dragging down the KOPSI and U.S. peers. Also, weakness within the industry may result from growing energy costs after the U.S. and Iran exchanged blows and President Trump's recent comments.
